ham: Dear resident, this is a reminder from your society office that the maintenance fee of ₹1200 is due on 30th April. Kindly pay through the app or visit the society office before 5th May to avoid late charges. For more details, visit <URL>.
spam: URGENT! A traffic violation notice has been issued against your vehicle. Pay the e‑challan of ₹1500 NOW via <URL> or call 9876543210 for assistance. Delay in payment may result in legal action.
